Video.summary: Gen. Clark begins the series by plunging you into combat with a 25-year-old Army captain in Vietnam in 1970.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: America: Forged in War

Image.alt: America: Forged in War
America: Forged in War
America: Forged in War

Video.summary: Analyze Washington's brilliant defense of Boston and his disastrous defeat trying to hold New York City.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: George Washington Takes Command

Image.alt: George Washington Takes Command
George Washington Takes Command
George Washington Takes Command

Video.summary: We are finally able to reveal the fascinating truths about ancient North America.
Video.title: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Image.alt: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Video.summary: DNA evidence points to Asia as the origin of all human migration to North America.
Video.title: The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Image.alt: The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Video.summary: Consider the imaginary lives of ordinary people who lived on the other side of history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Taking on the Other Side of History

Image.alt: Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History

Video.summary: Take a look at the lives of our ancestors, from ancient hominids to Homo erectus to the earliest humans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Paleolithic

Image.alt: Being Paleolithic
Being Paleolithic
Being Paleolithic

Video.summary: Professor McNabb discusses the foundation for medieval views of sex and sexuality.
Video.title: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Image.alt: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Video.summary: Consider medieval ideas about procreation and see how everyday people thought about their own bodies.
Video.title: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Image.alt: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Video.summary: Consider two chicken recipes 200 years and a continent apart.
Video.title: Understanding Culture through Cooking

Image.alt: Understanding Culture through Cooking
Understanding Culture through Cooking
Understanding Culture through Cooking

Video.summary: Are the recipes in De re coquinaria bizarre or elegant?
Video.title: Ancient Rome: Cooking with Apicius

Image.alt: Ancient Rome: Cooking with Apicius
Ancient Rome: Cooking with Apicius
Ancient Rome: Cooking with Apicius

Video.summary: What can the Bible tell us about life in biblical Israel? What can archaeology tell us?
Video.title: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Image.alt: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Video.summary: Start your journey through biblical Israel with a look at the Babylonian exile.
Video.title: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Image.alt: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Video.summary: This episode examines the features of late medieval culture in Italy that paved the way for the Renaissance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: Italy and the Renaissance

Image.alt: Italy and the Renaissance
Italy and the Renaissance
Italy and the Renaissance

Video.summary: Around 1400, study a European-wide style known as International Gothic flourished in Italy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Artists of the Italian Renaissance
Video.title: From Gothic to Renaissance

Image.alt: From Gothic to Renaissance
From Gothic to Renaissance
From Gothic to Renaissance

Video.summary: Begin by examining a pervasive symbol of late imperial China: opium.
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Imperial China: Dynasties, Life, and Culture
Video.title: Opium, Trade, and War in Imperial China

Image.alt: Opium, Trade, and War in Imperial China
Opium, Trade, and War in Imperial China
Opium, Trade, and War in Imperial China

Video.summary: Meet the famous terra-cotta warriors, one of China's most celebrated archaeological treasures.
Video.grandparentTitle: Understanding Imperial China: Dynasties, Life, and Culture
Video.title: The First Emperor's Terra-Cotta Warriors

Image.alt: The First Emperor's Terra-Cotta Warriors
The First Emperor's Terra-Cotta Warriors
The First Emperor's Terra-Cotta Warriors

Video.summary: Explore the main themes of the course, beginning with the concept of total war.
Video.title: The Century's Initial Catastrophe

Image.alt: The Century's Initial Catastrophe
The Century's Initial Catastrophe
The Century's Initial Catastrophe

Video.summary: Examine the state of Europe and the world before the onset of the war in 1914.
Video.title: Europe in 1914

Image.alt: Europe in 1914
Europe in 1914
Europe in 1914

Video.summary: Explore the prevailing attitudes in Europe, then the premonitions of coming disaster.
Video.title: Towards Crisis in Politics and Culture

Image.alt: Towards Crisis in Politics and Culture
Towards Crisis in Politics and Culture
Towards Crisis in Politics and Culture

Video.summary: Analyze the events that led to war, including an assassination and the chain reactions that followed.
Video.title: Causes of the War and the July Crisis, 1914

Image.alt: Causes of the War and the July Crisis, 1914
Causes of the War and the July Crisis, 1914
Causes of the War and the July Crisis, 1914

Video.summary: Analyze new research that questions how widespread the August Madness outburst really was.
Video.title: The August Madness

Image.alt: The August Madness
The August Madness
The August Madness

Video.summary: Follow the unfolding of the German Schlieffen Plan and the French Plan XVII.
Video.title: The Failed Gambles - War Plans Break Down

Image.alt: The Failed Gambles - War Plans Break Down
The Failed Gambles - War Plans Break Down
The Failed Gambles - War Plans Break Down

Video.summary: The Western Front soon froze into static trench warfare and horrific slaughter.
Video.title: The Western Front Experience

Image.alt: The Western Front Experience
The Western Front Experience
The Western Front Experience

Video.summary: Get a detailed overview of the trench landscape from the perspective of ordinary soldiers.
Video.title: Life and Death in the Trenches

Image.alt: Life and Death in the Trenches
